summary: 0.6.41 fixes demo3 text displays staying on authored defaults and rotates the side control groups around the side-screen yaw instead of only shifting them into left and right screen space.
operatorSignals: Demo3 sliders were moving, but the current and total text displays were still showing the authored defaults.
Display total should not default to 30:00; it should start at 00:00.
The side control groups were translated and yawed correctly, but the whole cluster was not rotated relative to the 45 degree side-screen angle.
actionsTaken: Changed the demo3 runtime text update path so UIText labels repaint from live state.
Changed the demo3 builder defaults so current and total displays both start at 00:00.
Changed the demo3 builder transform rebase so left and right control clones rotate their local offset around the owning screen yaw delta before parent linking.
nonGoals: No folder, filename, or remaining-time display additions.
